metadata.description: Skills for publishing solutions to the Microsoft Commercial Marketplace. Agents today; SaaS, containers, and managed applications planned.

plugins.name: agent-publishing
plugins.description: Publish and monetize Microsoft 365 Copilot agents (declarative, custom engine, Copilot Studio multitenant) on the Microsoft Commercial Marketplace.

plugins.name: partner-center-onboarding
plugins.description: Troubleshoot Microsoft Partner Center account verification (identity, legal-entity/tenant, business-existence, process visibility) for publishing Microsoft 365 Copilot agents.
